default.title: Horizon Tech | Software ya kompani, Cloud, mpe AI
default.description: Horizon Tech ebongisaka mpe epesaka baprogramɛ ya kompani, solutions AI, infrastructure ya cloud, mpe biloko ya digitale mpo na baekipi ya lokumu.

home.title: Horizon Tech | Ba systèmes ya ingénierie oyo ezali monene
home.description: Software ya entreprise, AI/ML, infrastructure ya cloud, mpe livraison ya IoT mpo na baekipi ya mokili mobimba.

about.title: A propos de Horizon Tech | Mission ya kompani mpe ekipi
about.description: Yekolá makambo etali Horizon Tech, misio na biso, mpe ndenge topesaka biyano ya makasi na teknoloji.

team.title: Equipe | Horizon Tech Leadership and Experts
team.description: Kokutana na ba ingénieurs mpe bakambi oyo bazali kotonga ba software ya kompanyi mpe ba plateformes ya cloud na Horizon Tech.

careers.title: Misala | Kotonga na Horizon Tech
careers.description: Yeba mikumba ya polele mpe kokolisa mosala na yo na ekipi ya ba ingénieurs ya Horizon Tech.

contact.title: Contacter Horizon Tech | Bandá mosala na yo
contact.description: Solola na Horizon Tech mpo na kolobela projet na yo, bamposa ya tekiniki, mpe ngonga ya kotinda yango.

caseStudies.title: Études de cas | Résultats ya Horizon Tech
caseStudies.description: Tanga ba études ya cas client mpe ba resultat ya Horizon Tech na ba industries nyonso.

blog.title: Blog | Horizon Tech Insights
blog.description: Mayele ya tekiniki, mateya ya livraison, mpe litambwisi ya architecture ya Horizon Tech.

education.title: Kelasi | Horizon Tech Learning Resources
education.description: Guides, références, mpe bisaleli ya koyekola ya tekiniki ya Horizon Tech.

support.title: Soutien | Horizon Tech
support.description: Luka banzela ya lisungi mpe banzela ya contact mpo na misala ya Horizon Tech.

privacy.title: Politique ya confidentialité | Horizon Tech
privacy.description: Tanga mibeko ya confidentialité ya Horizon Tech mpe mibeko ya kobatela makambo ya bato.

terms.title: Conditions de service | Horizon Tech
terms.description: Landá malako oyo ezali na site Internet na biso mpe na site Internet na biso.

profile.title: Profil | Horizon Tech
profile.description: Batela profil na yo ya Horizon Tech, paramètres, mpe makambo ya compte na yo.

firstTimeSetup.title: Installation ya mbala ya liboso | Horizon Tech
firstTimeSetup.description: Kokotisa compte ya mbala ya liboso mpo na kokoba na Horizon Tech.

forgotPassword.title: Obosani mot de passe | Horizon Tech
forgotPassword.description: Zongisa accès na compte na yo ya Horizon Tech.

resetPassword.title: Réinitialiser mot de passe | Horizon Tech
resetPassword.description: Sala mot de passe ya sika mpo na compte na yo ya Horizon Tech.

confirmEmail.title: Confirmer Email | Horizon Tech
confirmEmail.description: Confirmer adrɛsi e-mail na yo mpo na kofungola compte na yo ya Horizon Tech.

admin.title: Groupe d'admin | Horizon Tech
admin.description: Esika ya mosala ya administration mpo na Horizon Tech Platform Management.

unauthorized.title: Non autorisé | Horizon Tech
unauthorized.description: Na moyi ya lelo, ozali na posa ya kokota na site oyo te.

services.title: Services | Horizon Tech
services.description: Explore Horizon Tech services in software engineering, AI, cloud, DevOps, and digital transformation.

innovationLab.title: Laboratoire ya Innovation | Horizon Tech
innovationLab.description: Tala baekzamɛ ya Horizon Tech mpe baprototype na AI mpe ingénierie appliquée.

authCallback.description: Kokotisa signature sécurisée mpo na compte na yo ya Horizon Tech.
